name: Fintech Competitor Intelligence Bot v2 (Groq) Main

parameters.content:
## 🔒 Security Fix

**Hardcoded Groq API key removed.**

Before activating, create a credential:
1. Go to **Credentials → New**
2. Type: **Header Auth**
3. Name: `Groq API Key`
4. Header Name: `Authorization`
5. Header Value: `Bearer gsk_YOUR_KEY`

Also fixed: `rawContentType` was `"news"` on all 5 Groq nodes → corrected to `application/json`.

## 🔧 Bug Fix — CRED Port

CRED Site was wired to **port 3** (same as Zepto) on Merge Websites. n8n silently overwrites duplicate input ports, so CRED data was dropped every run.

✅ Fixed: CRED now connects to **port 4**.

## 🔧 Bug Fix — Reddit Scraping

Old URLs used the browser search page → returned **HTML**. Parse Social expected `data.children` JSON structure → got nothing.

✅ Fixed: URLs now use `.json` endpoint.
✅ Added `User-Agent` header (Reddit blocks all anonymous bot requests).
✅ Fixed CRED query: was `type=all`, now `type=link` (consistent with others).

## 🔄 Website Branch → Product RSS

HTTP GET scraping of competitor homepages removed.

**Why it failed:**
- Razorpay, PhonePe, etc. use React/Next.js — plain HTTP returns a shell `<div id="root"/>`
- PhonePe & CRED serve Cloudflare challenges to bots

✅ Replaced with **Google News RSS** using product-focused queries.
Captures real feature launches, pricing changes, and product announcements reliably.

## 🤖 AI Agent Removed

The Gemini AI Agent was receiving an already-formatted `telegram_message` from Parse Master and told to "make it professional" — it degraded the carefully built Markdown structure, stripped sections, and added latency.

✅ Telegram now sends `$json.telegram_message` from Parse Master directly.
✅ Gemini + Think1 nodes removed (no longer needed).

## 📊 Sheets Field Fixes

**Bug 1**: `$json.strategic_recommendation` was always undefined.
Parse Master outputs this under `strategic_playbook.immediate_action`.

**Bug 2**: `$json.executive_summary` can be an object `{situation, implication}` — was written as `[object Object]` in Sheets.

✅ Fixed both field paths.
✅ Added **Run ID** column (`$execution.id`) for deduplication.
✅ False path (LOW threat) already logged — confirmed and kept.
